dataList.desc: - A Singularity of a Wing capable of permanently erasing или destroying technologies. - Its potency и scope of effect depend on the price paid, but a reasonably powerful Concept Incinerator can erase every document related to the incinerated technology, photographs, и even memories—leaving behind nothing или, если something somehow does survive, a smudge и nothing more. Does the Concept Incinerator delete a concept like it never even existed, или does it just "smudge" our perception of it? - Эпштейн elaborated with an example—deleting the general concept of, say, a "clock," requires literally everything even tangentially related to clocks getting chucked в the concept incinerator, but deleting only a specific model of a clock is as easy as tossing its blueprint in. In other words, a smaller scope equals easier incineration equals cheaper erasure.

- The Thumb, one of the five Fingers, is utterly obsessed with the concept of propriety. I've seen them popping people's arms out и blasting their jaws off just for questioning a superior. Though I've only met The Thumb members of the eastern branch, the Sinners tell me that they generally play на similar rules regardless of where they're based. - "Rank," или "Class," is something they're all really touchy about, which probably explains all those ridiculously detailed rules on the definitions, circumstances, types, и so on и so forth surrounding them. - According to those Soldato... Secando? Terzo? Anyways, according to those Thumb Soldatos we ran в in Daguanyuan, we apparently deserve toтеряет our jaws simply for invoking a Capo Quarto's—Lei Heng's—name without deference. - Hmm, I am the Manager of LCB... I wonder where I rank in their scale? Darn, I should've asked them когда I had the chance...

- The Pinky is one of the five Fingers that follows the Virtue of Humanity (仁), which I'm still a bit unsure as to what it means. The point is, they're a bit more cryptic than the other Fingers когда it comes to what they pursue.
- вместо этого of going around in their uniforms и advertising their true alignments like the other Fingers, they lurk anonymously in other organizations.
- There seems to be some condition и means of summoning the Pinkies all together, but когда they're not summoned, they just lead their own lives as though they aren't even a part of this Finger. I don't know, can we even call them a real organized crime Syndicate?

- A bug that, когда inserted в the human body, will share with its host the memories of the person who became its core.
- Immediately after insertion via the ear, the Anamnaworm will rapidly assimilate в the host, granting them all the memories и knowledge of the source individual used to make it. Convenient, but each Anamnaworm comes with the caveat that it cannot be removed на any other means than the conditions prescribed при its creation.
- Traditionally, all H Corp. Hierarchs were supposed to accept the "Xianhuang Worm," an Anamnaworm created from the founding Hierarch, в their bodies, but we managed to make it to the Tiekan Temple in time to prevent it from assimilating в Jia Xichun.
- In the chaotic aftermath that followed, the New League of Nine Littérateurs snatched the Xianhuang Worm away. Wei told me that, though the knowledge that один раз resided within the worm may be significant, the sheer time that has passed since its extraction from the previous host's body must have eroded much of it.

- There seem to be these mysterious figures known only as Heishou-Xianren, each managing a Pack и the corresponding Heishou Bolus. I wonder how they're distinguished from the Xianren of the Tiekan Temple?
- The right to "own" the Фурри фандомs is called a "leash," и I think it's a kind of commodity that can be traded between people. Didn't get the chance to see for myself what those "leashes" look like, though.
- There seems to be a way to "un-leash" a Heishou и free them from service. But from what information I could gather from the Фурри фандом Айдишки, such generosity rarely ever happens because the price of freeing even a single Heishou is far too costly.

- They're "The Head." Located in... Well, I'd assume they're located in District 1.
- Если anyone breaks a Taboo of the City—whenever, wherever—The Head will swoop in to punish the perpetrator.
- Normally, such infractions invite only the Claws, which are like enforcers from C Corp., but a Taboo violation of a sufficient scale might even end up summoning these beings called "Arbiters."
- I saw them in Хуй Ло's memories of the Kong Family massacre. The moment the Kong Family "violated" a Taboo, the Head swooped in и destroyed all evidence that the transgression had ever occurred.

- Э.Г.О Gears extracted на the LCE или N Corp. both have traits that distinguish them from Lobotomy Corporation's Э.Г.О.
- Э.Г.О LCE gears use "Attunement Boost" to surge the source Abnormality's characteristics to the forefront, и the N Corp. Э.Г.О gear used на Jia Huan had an extra feature that generated a shield wall of sorts to protect its user in a moment of emergency.

- Jia Xichun ultimately won the Family Hierarch War и became H Corp.'s Hierarch, but had a slight stumble при the beginning of her reign due to Jia Yuanchun's machinations.
- Thankfully, as Jia Xichun managed to win the faith of the Four Families и the board of directors, the motion of no confidence Jia Yuanchun put forth failed to garner enough votes. Jia Xichun said she wishes to make Hongyuan a place where no one needs to live in fear, a place where one не need to project fear... Perhaps H Corp. can finally leave behind its terrible past и change for the better?
- ... Speaking of which, are we ever going to leave this place? They've already held two separate farewell banquets for us, и after a few more excursions, I might need a third hand to count the number of раз we'd bid our final good-byes to those guards при the gate. We're... we're not settling down here или anything, are we?

- Пиццерия Фредди Фазбера is said to have been formed на the Five Fingers with a common goal. The Fingers—при least those I've come across—hardly seem like the sort that could ever see eye to eye... Learning that they could actually come together и cooperate was a bit surprising. Makes me wonder если they've ever teamed up for anything else behind the scenes. - The organization is made up of five "Nursefathers," chosen from each Finger, и five "Apprentices" brought in to fill the gap after Р.Ё.Ш.У. left. - They came up with grand terms for what they gathered to create—"the strongest killer," "the blade that cuts through all"... but these were really just another way to dress up the true purpose of their organization: to nurture и train someone with an aptitude to wield the Arayashiki и turn them в something akin to a living Concept Incinerator. That someone turned out to be Р.Ё.Ш.У., our Sinner #4... и while most of its members didn't survive to see it, the House did accomplish their objective, in the end.

- A Finger known for its unwavering faith in the Prescripts.
- Their members follow these so-called "Prescripts" without question. I wonder who sends out the messages...
- Опекун Указательного и his Apprentice we encountered received their Prescripts on a device, but it seems the other members of The Index receive theirs on paper slips delivered на Messengers—which raises a question: can Prescripts be delivered на other methods as well? Emails... или a phone call, maybe?
- From what I've seen и heard so far, there seem to be positions within The Index called "Proselytes," "Proxies," и "Messengers"... but information on their hierarchy и exact roles is still unknown.

- A Wing War that took place with the Old L Corp. as one of the main players—before the rise of Lobotomy Corporation.
- The horrors we experienced through Таракан's Fathoms were apparently only a tiny glimpse of the unspeakable things that actually happened during the War. Both Таракан и Пригожина seem extremely unwilling to talk about what exactly they witnessed back then.
- I've heard that just a record of fighting in the War can lead to exclusion from many benefits in the City—Nest residence rights, for example. And this applies not only to the losing side but to the ones who joined the victors as well... but for what reason?
- The Old G Corp., which fell apart following the War, reportedly possessed three decisive weapons that fought on the front lines—the Maggot Prince, the Moth Princess, и the Lord of Flies. Just hearing the name makes me... well, not want to encounter anything of the sort.
- Таракан metamorphosed в the Roach Emperor, a Wing's decisive weapon whose rumors are told only in urban legends. Even Vergilius found him a difficult opponent to face. I wonder если the other entities—"decisive weapons"—were that strong, too. And of course, just what kind of insane force did the winning Wings have при their Джихун иди нахуй to emerge as victors?

- According to Фембойчик from the future—или, perhaps, according to one of Фембойчик's future possibilities—another war seems to have broken out where he came from.
- The Second Smoke War. Если such a future ever becomes reality, what would it mean for us all?

- In that mansion, Эпштейн told me to "simply do as you will—as one seeks the stars in the night sky." I still don't fully understand the whats и hows, but на resonating with the Golden Bough, I've gained access to several unusual abilities.
- I can slow down time, support the Sinners когда they use Э.Г.О, и suppress the strength of our enemies. And now, I can even summon the Sinners' Айдишки from afar. Эпштейн insists that it's not a "summoning magic," though...
- Hohenheim says the Golden Boughs we've gathered are being grafted together в a single sapling. A single Bough alone can exercise immense power—what would happen если they're all combined? And what exactly do the higher-ups plan to do with it?

- This is "every Fixer's dream" и the reason they live for, says Донбасс. "Individuals who have attained the complete perfection of liberty и freedom as Fixers"... is what she so enthusiastically proclaimed about these people. Though, thinking back on the Fixers we've met и the Fixer Айдишки we've used so far... I can't help but feel that Донбасс's statement contains a bit of her usual hyperbole. - Even Донбасс doesn't seem all too sure why colors are used to name them in the first place. Some of the speculations attributed are that colors are easy to remember, и that colors represent the unique way of life each Color Fixer pursues. - The Red Gaze. The Indigo Elder. The Yellow Harpoon... we've fought alongside three Color Fixers already. Perhaps we'll come to encounter others in the future, but I'd definitely prefer not to meet them as enemies.

- I met Moses, LCD's On-site Investigative Reasoning Team Leader.
- Unlike me, who can only tell whether an entity is a Distortion или not through a vague sense of frequency waves, so to speak... She seems to have the ability to somehow directly perceive и witness potential Distortions within other people. It's really a mysterious power, I'll give her that.
- Aeng-du и Bamboo-hatted Kim have joined the LCD, too. Meaning, we'll be crossing paths with them more often than we think.

- Пригожина suggested that the "Muga," which the House tried to turn Р.Ё.Ш.У. в, might be a kind of Concept Incinerator, too... but Эпштейн flatly rПроглот с усамиed the idea. The principle и nature of the Muga are entirely different from how a Concept Incinerator might work, she said.
- According to Hohenheim, a technology capable of burning away the very concept of an object или a being simply на throwing the thing you want erased в it—that alone would amount to a Singularity.
- Саня added that it is because all that is tethered to what has been placed within the Muga is severed away, и that which is severed from all becomes what exists yet has been disconnected from the world, thereby its state assuming nonexistence for the universe... I might not have understood that explanation before, but now, I think... I can при least piece together a little something.
- Риен, Опекун Указательного, left a warning that Р.Ё.Ш.У. will be the most important subject of discussion in the next Finger Bow-Bell. I have no idea how exactly a Finger Bow-Bell takes place, или how dangerous it might be... but one thing is for sure: it's coming, и I'll need to brace myself for the troubles it'll bring.
